titles.title: Restore To Me The Joy Of Thy Salvation

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I seem to lose the strength I've had before, I need the leadership of Your Spirit even more; Oh Lord You know I feel alone, I don't ever want to be on my own, anymore.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And yet I know that something lies ahead, And if yield to the Spirit I'll be led; Within the perfect plan of God, In His glory I will trod, forever more.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Restore to me the joy of Thy salvation, Reveal to me the secrets of Your heart; If I could learn to understand Thee, I'd see how great Thou art.
